decisions.finding: Override data never consumed by improvement pipeline
decisions.action: Wire override frequency into both session-start AND /alerts — threshold 10 bypasses per check in 7 days

decisions.finding: No alerting threshold for high-frequency bypasses
decisions.action: Folded into C1-G1 — 10 bypasses per check in 7 days threshold confirmed

decisions.finding: Trend calculation broken — compares all-time vs previous week instead of week-over-week
decisions.action: Fix date window logic in log-override.js to compare rolling 7-day windows

decisions.finding: Warnings are generic — no file names, pattern types, or progression context
decisions.action: Enrich warning payloads from check-propagation.js and check-triggers.js with top 3 affected files and pattern name

decisions.finding: No severity escalation for recurring warnings — same info level forever
decisions.action: Add occurrence counting to append-hook-warning.js — escalate 5+ to warning, 15+ to error. Pair with C2-G4 (JSONL trail analysis)

decisions.finding: Warning → action loop broken — no acknowledgment tracking, no pause-and-respond gate
decisions.action: Add last_acknowledged + occurrences_since_ack to hook-warnings.json. BROADER ISSUE: session-start/session-begin has no 'stop and respond to warnings' gate — warnings are fire-and-forget wallpaper. Needs session-begin skill fix to pause on unacknowledged warnings before continuing.
decisions.note: User identified this as inherent flaw in session start/begin skills — not just a hook warning issue

decisions.finding: JSONL warning trail (32 entries) is never analyzed — no trend detection or /alerts integration
decisions.action: Add hook-warning-trends dimension to /alerts reading JSONL trail. Pairs with C2-G2 (escalation) and C1-G1 (override analytics). Must surface in learnings review at end.
decisions.note: User: all implementations must surface in end-of-process learnings review with options and recommendations

decisions.finding: No automated learning → action pipeline — override, warning, and health data are all passive
decisions.action: Create hook learning synthesizer at session-end (reads override-log + warning-log + health-score-log, surfaces top 3 recurring issues). ALSO wire into /alerts. CRITICAL: must force acknowledgment — passive surfacing is useless per user feedback (recurring theme from C2-G3).
decisions.note: User: if it doesn't MAKE me acknowledge it, it's useless. Add to alerts as well.

decisions.finding: PR retro learnings delayed — same recommendation 5 times before action, no escalation trigger
decisions.action: Add escalation rule to pr-retro skill: 3+ occurrences of same recommendation → auto-tag CRITICAL and add to session action items

decisions.finding: Override patterns don't create TDMS entries — 30 propagation + 28 CC bypasses with no DEBT items
decisions.action: Auto-generate DEBT entry when check bypassed 15+ times in 14 days. Deduplicate against MASTER_DEBT. Source: hook-override-auto, severity S2, category engineering-productivity.

decisions.finding: No closed-loop verification — learnings not marked addressed, no before/after metrics
decisions.action: Add learning_addressed field to reviews.jsonl. Depends on C3-G2 and C3-G3 being in place first.

decisions.finding: 78% of overrides cite 'pre-existing' — gates defeated by noise
decisions.action: BAN 'pre-existing' as a skip reason. Codify across: (1) SKIP_REASON validator in pre-commit/pre-push to reject reasons containing 'pre-existing'/'pre existing', (2) CLAUDE.md or CODE_PATTERNS.md to document the rule, (3) known-debt-baseline.json so gates only block on regressions — eliminating the NEED for 'pre-existing' as a reason. Either fix the underlying debt or use baseline mode.
decisions.note: User: 'pre-existing' is NOT a skip reason anymore. Codify everywhere. Fix now or create DEBT item.

decisions.finding: No baseline/diff-only mode for known debt
decisions.action: Folded into C4-G1 — baseline file is the implementation mechanism for the 'pre-existing' ban. Option A (known-debt-baseline.json) accepted.

decisions.finding: Override fatigue — 2-3 SKIP flags per push becomes reflexive copy-paste
decisions.action: Add bypass budget metric to /alerts — track weekly override count vs average, flag when above threshold. Safety net for C4-G1 baseline.

decisions.finding: No integration between override-log and TDMS
decisions.action: Folded into C3-G3 — override → DEBT auto-intake at 15+ bypasses in 14 days

decisions.finding: No integration between hook-warnings-log and /alerts
decisions.action: Folded into C2-G4 — hook-warning-trends dimension in /alerts

decisions.finding: Health score history not surfaced at session-start — F/59 invisible unless you run /ecosystem-health
decisions.action: Session-start reads latest health score entry, shows one-liner with grade + delta. 2+ grade drop = warning. MUST include action prompt (recurring theme) — not just informational text.
decisions.note: User: if there is no action prompt it gets lost in the shuffle

decisions.finding: require_skip_reason() + fnm init duplicated verbatim across pre-commit and pre-push (44 LOC)
decisions.action: Extract to .husky/_shared.sh sourced by both hooks. Also enables single-place implementation of C4-G1 'pre-existing' ban.

decisions.finding: EXIT trap inconsistency — pre-commit chains safely, pre-push overwrites
decisions.action: Move add_exit_trap() into .husky/_shared.sh (piggybacks on C6-G1). Pre-push adopts chaining pattern.

decisions.finding: STAGED_FILES computed 3x identically in pre-commit (lines 172, 299, 338)
decisions.action: Compute once after fnm init, reuse variable throughout pre-commit

decisions.finding: Security check temp file assumes .js extension for mixed-content diff — false positives on non-JS content
decisions.action: Filter diff to only .js/.ts file content before passing to security-check.js. Use diff --git headers to identify file type.

decisions.finding: Code-reviewer gate has no timestamp validation — stale entries from days ago pass the check (HIGH)
decisions.action: Option A: Parse JSONL, extract most recent code-reviewer timestamp, verify within 4 hours. Preserves historical data for analytics.

decisions.finding: Propagation check runs twice — pre-commit warning is noise, pre-push blocking is the real gate
decisions.action: Remove gate 3b (propagation warning) from pre-commit. Keep blocking version in pre-push. Saves 1-2s/commit, eliminates 13 of 32 warning-log entries.

decisions.finding: CANON validation gate fires ~1-2% of commits, non-blocking, CI validates same thing
decisions.action: Remove gate 5 (CANON validation) from pre-commit. Rely on CI.

decisions.finding: Test coverage warning (gate 13) redundant with CI test registry — non-blocking, hardcoded, less accurate
decisions.action: Remove gate 13 (test coverage warning) from pre-commit. CI test registry is authoritative. Saves 40 LOC.

decisions.finding: append-hook-warning.js failures silently swallowed (2>/dev/null || true) — audit trail dies without notice
decisions.action: Replace silent suppression with logging to HOOK_OUTPUT_LOG. Non-blocking but visible. Protects C1-C2 decisions.

decisions.finding: Pre-push type check + CC checks run sequentially (~12-14s) — could parallelize for ~5-8s savings
decisions.action: Parallelize tsc, cyclomatic CC, and cognitive CC in pre-push using same background-process pattern as pre-commit Wave 1.

decisions.finding: No hook catches null/undefined safety — #1 reviewer finding across Qodo reviews
decisions.action: Defer to TDMS. Option A (standalone diff-only scanner) is viable; Option B (strict TS ESLint rules) needs deep-plan due to repo-wide perf + violation impact.

decisions.finding: Security trigger blocks on filenames not content — 100% false positive rate, 10 bypasses in 30 days
decisions.action: Tighten security trigger: check changed line content (like security-check.js) OR exclude test files and docs from filename pattern matching.

decisions.finding: Consolidation trigger redundant with session-start — non-blocking warning during push is wallpaper
decisions.action: Remove consolidation trigger from check-triggers.js. Session-start handles it with better context and timing.

meta.learnings_review_format: description of issue, options, recommendation — then act on them immediately
meta.recurring_theme: Passive surfacing is useless — all improvements MUST force acknowledgment. Fire-and-forget warnings become wallpaper. This applies to session-start, session-end, and /alerts.
meta.side_note_hook_audit_skill: Any categories or checks from this mini-audit that are NOT present in the hook-ecosystem-audit skill (or script-ecosystem-audit if applicable) MUST be added. Cross-check all 9 categories against the existing audit skill categories.
learnings_to_present: L1: Passive surfacing is useless — needs acknowledgment gate in session-begin + CLAUDE.md rule
L2: Pre-existing is not a valid excuse — ban word + create baseline
L3: Data without consumers is dead weight — wire override/warning/health into /alerts + session-end
L4: Escalation must be automatic — pr-retro 3+ rule, warning 5+/15+ escalation
L5: Duplicate code between hooks is maintenance risk — extract to _shared.sh
L6: Gates that never catch anything should be removed — CANON, test warning, propagation pre-commit
wave0_changes: C10-G1: Replaced 5 direct fs calls with safe-fs wrappers (suggest-pattern-automation.js: 1 writeFileSync, archive-doc.js: 3 renameSync + 1 writeFileSync)
C6-G3: Computed STAGED_FILES once after fnm init in pre-commit, removed 3 duplicate computations
C7-G5: Replaced 2>/dev/null || true on 13 append-hook-warning calls with visible logging (pre-commit: removed 2>/dev/null since exec redirect covers it, pre-push: redirect to HOOK_OUTPUT_LOG)
wave1_changes: C6-G1: Created .husky/_shared.sh with add_exit_trap, is_skipped, require_skip_reason, _shared_init_fnm. Both hooks source it.
C6-G2: Pre-push raw trap replaced with add_exit_trap chaining (SEC_TMPFILE cleanup).
C4-G1: 'pre-existing' ban added to require_skip_reason() — case-insensitive, catches pre-existing/pre existing/preexisting. known-debt-baseline.json schema created.
~44 LOC of duplication removed across both hooks.
wave2_changes: C7-G2: Removed gate 3b (propagation warning) from pre-commit — pre-push blocks, this was noise (13/32 warning entries).
C7-G3: Removed gate 5 (CANON validation) from pre-commit — fires ~1-2%, non-blocking, CI validates same thing.
C7-G4: Removed gate 13 (test coverage warning) from pre-commit — redundant with CI test registry, ~40 LOC removed.
C9-G2: Removed consolidation trigger from check-triggers.js — session-start handles with better context. ~80 LOC removed (checkConsolidationTrigger + countPendingReviews).
wave3_changes: C7-G1: Code-reviewer gate now parses JSONL timestamps, verifies invocation within 4 hours (node one-liner).
C6-G4: Security diff filtered to .js/.ts content only using awk + diff --git headers — eliminates false positives from non-JS content.
C9-G1: Security trigger excludes test files (tests/, .test., .spec., __tests__/) — reduces false positive rate.
C8-G1: Parallelized tsc + cyclomatic CC + cognitive CC in pre-push using background subshells + tmpfiles — ~5-8s savings.
C10-G4: CC baseline support in check-cc.js — --update-baseline flag, readBaseline/writeBaseline, regression-only gating via known-debt-baseline.json.
wave4_changes: C2-G1: Enriched warning payloads — append-hook-warning.js accepts --files and --pattern args, stored in warning entries. Pre-push extracts top 3 files from propagation + pattern compliance output.
C2-G2: Auto-escalation — countRecentOccurrences() reads JSONL trail, 5+ occurrences escalates info→warning, 15+ escalates to error.
C2-G3: Acknowledgment tracking — data.acknowledged map preserved across clears, occurrences_since_ack computed per warning entry.
C1-G3: Fixed trend calculation — per-check trends added to computeAnalytics(), null for new activity (no baseline), fmtPct display in showAnalytics().
wave5_changes: C1-G1: Per-check override frequency alert in run-alerts.js checkSkipAbuse() — 10 bypasses/check/7d threshold.
C4-G3: Bypass budget metric in run-alerts.js checkSkipAbuse() — current week vs 4-week rolling average, 1.5x spike = warning.
C2-G4: Hook-warning-trends week-over-week comparison in run-alerts.js checkHookHealth() — 50%+ increase with 5+ delta = warning.
C5-G3: Health score delta at session-start — reads health-score-log.jsonl, shows grade + delta, 2+ grade drop = warning with counter increment.
C3-G1: Hook learning synthesizer step (5b) added to session-end SKILL.md — top 3 recurring issues from override-log + warning-log + health-score-log.

L3: Wired data into session-begin (7b anomaly gate: override trend 50%+, 10+ warnings, 2+ grade drop), session-end (7f hook data summary one-liner), /alerts (hook drill-down section with override/warning/health detail).
wave7_changes: L1: Added guardrail #6 'All passive surfacing must force acknowledgment' to CLAUDE.md Section 4.
L1: Added warning acknowledgment gate (7c) to session-begin SKILL.md — reads hook-warnings.json, presents unacknowledged warnings, requires ack before proceeding.
L6: Added Gate Effectiveness Review step to hook-ecosystem-audit Phase 5 — override frequency, false positive rate, catch rate per gate.
Side note: Added Coverage Cross-Check to hook-ecosystem-audit Phase 5 — maps all 10 mini-audit categories to audit checker domains, flags uncovered categories (C3 learnings, C5 cross-system).
wave6_changes: C3-G2: Added 3+ same recommendation = CRITICAL escalation rule to pr-retro SKILL.md Step 2 (recurring patterns analysis).

C3-G3: Auto-DEBT generation in log-override.js — checkBypassDebtThreshold() counts 14-day bypasses per check, creates DEBT entry at 15+ (deduplicates against MASTER_DEBT, writes to both MASTER_DEBT and deduped.jsonl).
L4: No additional work (confirms C2-G2 auto-escalation + C3-G2 retro escalation).

learnings_decisions.learning: Passive surfacing is useless — needs acknowledgment gate
learnings_decisions.action: Add acknowledgment gate to session-begin skill + codify 'all passive surfacing must force acknowledgment' as a rule in CLAUDE.md Section 4 (Behavioral Guardrails)

learnings_decisions.learning: Pre-existing is not a valid excuse — ban word + create baseline
learnings_decisions.action: Confirms C4-G1 — ban 'pre-existing' as skip reason + known-debt-baseline.json. No scope change needed.

learnings_decisions.learning: Data without consumers is dead weight — wire into active surfaces
learnings_decisions.action: Wire override-log, warning-log, health-score-log into 3 surfaces: (1) session-begin as acknowledgment gate on anomalies only (override trend up 50%+, warning threshold, health drop 2+ grades), (2) session-end as passive archival summary one-liner, (3) /alerts as opt-in drill-down. Session-begin is the only forced-acknowledgment surface.

learnings_decisions.learning: Escalation must be automatic — repeated signals at constant volume become noise
learnings_decisions.action: Implement escalation in individual systems now (C2-G2 warning 5+/15+, C3-G2 pr-retro 3+ same rec). Centralize into unified engine when 5+ systems use escalation logic.

learnings_decisions.learning: Duplicate code between hooks is maintenance risk — no shared file convention existed
learnings_decisions.action: Extract require_skip_reason(), is_skipped(), add_exit_trap(), fnm init to .husky/_shared.sh. Both hooks source it. Confirms C6-G1/C6-G2. No lint check needed at current scale.

learnings_decisions.learning: Gates that never catch anything should be removed — non-blocking duplicates are worse than useless
learnings_decisions.action: Remove 3 dead gates (confirms C7-G2/G3/G4) + add gate effectiveness review step to hook-ecosystem-audit skill (catch rate, blocking vs non-blocking, duplicate detection).

category10_decisions.finding: 5 no-raw-fs-write pattern violations in suggest-pattern-automation.js and archive-doc.js
category10_decisions.action: Fix now — replace 5 direct fs calls with safe-fs wrappers (safeWriteFileSync, safeRenameSync)

category10_decisions.finding: Test suite 40% pass rate, 31 days stale — health score based on fiction
category10_decisions.action: Run test suite diagnostic. Fix trivial failures inline. Create targeted DEBT items for complex failures. Update health state file with fresh results.

category10_decisions.finding: 39 S0 critical debt items — likely over-assigned, poisoning health score and desensitizing severity
category10_decisions.action: Bulk reclassify S0 items: keep S0 only for security vulnerabilities, data loss, or production-breaking bugs. Reclassify doc/process/tooling items to S1. Codify S0 criteria.

category10_decisions.finding: 267 CC violations across 100 files — gate always bypassed, effectively disabled
category10_decisions.action: Implement known-debt-baseline for CC (pairs with C4-G1). Baseline records current CC per file, gate only blocks on regressions. Zero bypasses needed on day one.

category10_decisions.finding: 6 propagation patterns across 500+ files, 1200+ violations — gate always bypassed
category10_decisions.action: Apply baseline (C4-G1) to stop bypasses. Fix security-critical patterns only: writeFileSync without symlink guard (321 occurrences) and path.resolve without containment (272 occurrences). Baseline the remaining 4 patterns (filter(Boolean), statSync, rmSync, escapeCell) as tracked debt.
